surface_verification.justification: Pure-Python Stop-hook decision logic (bloat_gate_on_stop baseline-source resolution); no startable app/UI/CLI surface. Empirical verification = the regression suite reproducing the production false-block (Red before fix, Green after) + the safety counter-case (over-ceiling still blocks) + the #150 fallback-to-main case; 28 bloat tests + adversarial review. (A transient F0 arch-impact false-positive from a parallel S4 decision-drop was resolved by integrating origin/main, which carries S4's architecture.md entry.)

behaviors.behavior: worktree iterate that bumped a baseline (file == worktree ceiling) does NOT false-block at Stop
real ratchet still blocks: file over even the WORKTREE's bumped ceiling blocks
file baselined ONLY in the worktree (absent from main) not treated as a new crossing
fallback to MAIN baseline when the worktree has none (#150 scenario preserved)
main-tree-path entries unchanged (_worktree_root None -> main baseline)
behaviors.evidence: test_bloat_gate_on_stop (16 existing invariants: anti-ratchet/new-crossing block, session-scope, TTL, fail-open) PASSED
